message:
fix(storage): add MVCC visibility retry in concurrent write test

The concurrent RunStore insertion test could sporadically fail because
frankensqlite's MVCC layer may not make all 5 concurrent writes visible
to a fresh read-only connection instantaneously. Add a retry loop (up to
5 attempts with 50ms sleep) before asserting the final count, and reopen
the store for individual run verification after the count is confirmed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
